name: Supermicro server boards (AMI Aptio variant)
description: Supermicro server motherboards ship AMI Aptio V UEFI firmware customised by Supermicro. CRTM strings identify the board family + BIOS revision.
secure-boot-default: disabled on server SKUs (can be enabled per-deployment)
ipmi-note: Supermicro server BIOSes measure additional events for IPMI (BMC handoff) on PCR 6 — see the `supermicro-h12ssl` fixture in priv/tpm-interpret/fixtures/.
notes: Supermicro AMD EPYC (H12/H13) platforms commonly pair Nuvoton NPCT75x TPMs with AMD fTPM available as an alternative. The SUPERMICRO PK CA cert appears in PCR 7 EV_EFI_VARIABLE_DRIVER_CONFIG events; recognisable by `CN=Super Micro Computer, Inc. Platform Key, OU=BIOS`.
source: Supermicro BIOS release notes; observed PK cert from the supermicro-h12ssl.bios_measurements test vector.
